entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation Plan compilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE AccountRequest PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=ADM-Aaron Rivera,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Set" value="adm-Aaron Rivera"/> <AttributeRequest name="givenName" op="Set" value="Aaron"/> <AttributeRequest name="sn" op="Set" value="Rivera"/> <AttributeRequest name="mail" op="Set" value="Aaron.Rivera@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="password" op="Set" value="Mahesh@1045"/> </AccountRequest>
